description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a detached single-car garage to one side. The house is surrounded by a low fence and features a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The exterior walls are smooth and feature large, rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light. There is a small garden area with shrubs and a tree, adding greenery to the property. The garage has a dark, gable-style roof, contrasting with the flat roof of the main house. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a detached garage, and a fenced yard with greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, the detached garage with a dark roof, and the fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, asymmetrical window placement, and the garden area along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, additional windows, and the garage positioned to the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the garage's gable roof and the house's flat roof, with the fence enclosing the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a small overhang, flush with the facade, and a paved walkway leading to the entrance.
